get.description: Returns a simple HTML page indicating that the server is working, along with a link to the API documentation.

schema.example:
Server is working You can check api documentation here:

Api Documentation

get.description: Returns the complete OpenAPI/Swagger JSON document used to render the API documentation interface.

200.description: Success - Returns the full OpenAPI specification in JSON format

schema.description: The complete OpenAPI 3.0.0 specification object containing all paths, schemas, and components.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Title of post

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of post

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: Author id of post

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category of post

content_text.example:
Added text formatting options when creating a post

data.author: 6752048ba8b54c2224d7d30a
data.title: Update v2.1.1 | 29.01.2026

Added text formatting options when creating a post

You can check it here

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of post

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Should response expand fields (e.g., 'author')

patch.description: Updates specific fields of an existing post. Requires authentication and ownership (or admin rights).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the post to update

featured_image.description: New content of the post image if updating

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of post

post.description: Adds the authenticated user's ID to the post's likes array. Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the post to like

delete.description: Removes the authenticated user's ID from the post's likes array. Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the post to unlike

post.description: Adds a post to the authenticated user's saved posts list. Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the post to save

value.message: Post is already in saved posts!

delete.description: Removes a post from the authenticated user's saved posts list. Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the post to unsave

value.message: Post is not in saved posts!

post.description: Creates a new comment for the specified post. If 'parent_comment_id' is provided, it acts as a reply to an existing comment.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the post to comment on

parent_comment_id.description: ID of the parent comment if this is a reply

post_id.description: Returned if it is a root comment

comment_text.message: Comment text must be not empty!

404.description: Parent comment or Post not found

get.description: Fetches a list of tree-structured comments for a specific post. Supports expanding author details.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the post to get comments from

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Fields to expand in the response

Without Expand.summary: Обычный ответ (author в виде ID группы)

get.description: Fetches a list of all available post categories. Returns an empty array if no categories exist.

get.summary: Get all users or search users
get.description: Fetches a list of users based on optional filters. Note: fields 'email' and 'saved_posts' are completely omitted from the object if their respective public flags are false.

parameters.name: nick_name
parameters.description: Nick name of the user

parameters.name: _id
parameters.description: Id of the user

parameters.name: is_admin
parameters.description: Indicates whether the user has admin privileges

parameters.name: is_verified
parameters.description: Indicates whether the user has been verified

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of user

Public Flags True.description: Пример, когда флагам выставлено true, и поля email и saved_posts отдаются бэкендом.

Public Flags False.description: Тот же юзер, но с флагами false. Поля email и saved_posts полностью исключены из структуры JSON.

get.description: Fetches a single user object by their unique nickname. Fields 'email' and 'saved_posts' will be omitted if their public visibility flags are set to false.

parameters.name: nick_name
parameters.description: Nick name of the user

User Found (Private).description: Поля email и saved_posts полностью вырезаны, так как соответствующие флаги равны false.

nick_name.message: Nick name must be longer than 3 characters!

post.description: Allows the authenticated user to follow another user by their ID. Updates both users' follows/followers arrays. Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to follow

400.description: Bad Request - validation error in path params

409.description: Conflict - already following or trying to follow yourself

value.message: You are already following this user!

delete.description: Allows the authenticated user to unfollow another user by their ID. Removes IDs from both users' follows/followers arrays. Requires authorization.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to unfollow

400.description: Bad Request - validation error in path params

409.description: Conflict - not following this user or trying to unfollow yourself

Not Following.summary: Вы не подписаны на этого пользователя

value.message: You are not following this user!

post.description: Authenticates a user using their username and password, returning a JWT token upon success.

password.message: Passowrd must be longer than 7 characters!

post.description: Authenticates a user using a Google OAuth token. Returns a JWT token upon successful authentication.

token.description: JWT authentication token for the application

400.description: Bad Request - invalid Google token or validation error

post.description: Verifies a Google OAuth token and checks if the associated email is already registered in the system.

google_token.description: The OAuth2 token obtained from Google to verify

400.description: Bad Request - validation or token error

post.description: Verifies the confirmation code sent to the user's email address.

email_code.description: The verification code received by the user

400.description: Bad Request - validation error or expired/invalid code

email.message: No pending confirmation found for this email address. Please request a new code!

post.description: Generates and sends a verification code to the specified email address.

email.description: The email address to send the verification code to

400.description: Bad Request - validation error in request body

get.description: Retrieves the profile details of the currently authenticated user, including notifications, follows, and settings.

patch.description: Updates profile fields such as nickname, description, privacy settings, and avatar via form-data. All fields are optional.

is_saved_posts_public.description: Privacy flag for saved posts visibility.

avatar.description: User avatar image file. Uploading a valid file sets/replaces the avatar. Sending an empty file, nothing, or null deletes the current avatar and resets it to null.

400.description: Bad Request - Validation errors in fields

nick_name.message: Nick name must be longer than 3 characters!

description.message: Description must be longer than 60 characters!

401.description: Unauthorized - User is not logged in

message.example: Nick name is already used by another user!

patch.description: Updates all unread notifications for the currently authenticated user, setting their status to read.

401.description: Unauthorized - User is not logged in

example.message: This user doesn't have permission to do this action!

errors.description: Объект с описанием ошибок валидации по сегментам (query, body, params)

ids.message: Incorrect id format in ids query field!

user.description: ID of the user who triggered the notification
